name: @valve-tech/example-unchained-tx-history
description: Static web app: type any EVM address, see every transaction it appears in. A TrueBlocks chifra index serves the appearances; transactions hydrate client-side over batched JSON-RPC — or run it fully trustless against your own node + IPFS gateway. Demonstrates @valve-tech/trueblocks-sdk and @valve-tech/unchained-reader.
